full_text:
88 special rescue crew members & 2 service dogs from @NewTaipeiGov have been dispatched to #Hualien, where Super #Typhoon #Ragasa & a lake barrier burst, caused at least 14 deaths. 

I'll donate my monthly salary to support relief efforts & hope they can get through this. https://t.co/BmFQwiZ5uc

I warmly welcomed @eu_eeas Amb. @LutzGuellner. #NewTaipeiCity & the #EU frequently interact, particularly in the energy & high-tech sectors. @NewTaipeiGov also joins @IURC_Programme. I encourage companies to diversify investments in the 🇪🇺 & not put all their eggs in one basket. https://t.co/hxKSDIoidc

Congratulations to teenage baseball players of New Taipei Municipal Er Chong Junior High School for winning first place in the 2025 U15 #BFA Asian Baseball Championship!

Fueled by the cheering from the Taiwanese audience, I know you were determined to keep the trophy at home. https://t.co/kQlVWuBSfR

It's a pleasure to host Amb. Ruth Bradley-Jones of @UKinTaiwan. @NewTaipeiGov & the #UK 🇬🇧 are dedicated to building urban #resilience through disaster prevention & early warning systems. #Renewable energy & offshore wind power are critical for #Taiwan to collaborate with the UK. https://t.co/TH6vXf0dwE

Happy Father's Day!

A father is like a light, a shadow—always there for his children.

Silently illuminating his children's path in life.

Guarding and accompanying them every step of the way. https://t.co/bmincKQWs1

After wasting NT$1.2 billion on a failed #recall campaign, the Lai administration's biggest "achievement" this year is a painful 20% #tariff.

The tariff rate is higher than our Asian neighbors'. How long will this "temporary" rate last? And at what cost to #Taiwan's industries? https://t.co/J4t4dsRA1S

An 8.8 magnitude #earthquake occurred in the #KamchatkaPeninsula, Russia. This may cause a #tsunami in the coastal areas of #NewTaipeiCity. 

According to the #CentralWeatherAdministration, the ETA to #Taiwan is around 1:40 PM today, July 30, 2025. Please be careful and prepared. https://t.co/Dlo7EnrRRo

We may differ in our views, but we are not enemies. We care deeply about this land we call home.

Let's not erase diverse voices, but forge harmony. It’s the beauty of our freedom, our democracy & our everyday lives.

Let's bring politics back to reason & people back to living. https://t.co/waMvrhICt3

NO to political struggle.
NO to political purge.
#Vote #NO to reject the mass #recall campaign on Saturday, July 26, 2025! https://t.co/Umn6FEl3zh

Congratulations on the achievements of #Taiwan's athletes, medalists, and their coaches at @FISU in #RhineRuhr2025 🇩🇪 #Unisport!

I also denounce any disruptive behaviors directed at Taiwan's athletes in the sporting arena.

Let's cheer on Taiwan's athletes! Go Taiwan! 🇹🇼

The 2025 Urban Resilience Air Raid Drills in #NewTaipeiCity will take place from 1:30 PM to 2:00 PM on Thursday, July 17, 2025. 

When hearing sirens or receiving warning messages, please follow the instructions of the police & duty officers and proceed to the nearest shelters. https://t.co/HgsGbgM1NO

People matter! #NewTaipeiCity wasn't severely damaged by #TyphoonDanas, but Tainan & Chiayi were. Staff from @NewTaipeiGov's public works, agriculture, and environmental protection depts have been dispatched to assist those affected in #Tainan & #Chiayi. Thanks for their service. https://t.co/stW1R1efyN

World-renowned @Uber & @NewTaipeiGov are exploring potential collaborations in rural areas & holiday services at popular tourist destinations in #NewTaipeiCity. I welcomed Andrew Byrne, Uber's VP of Global Public Policy, and his team for their visit on future possibilities. https://t.co/13yY50CDjg

Earlier in June, I welcomed the delegation from Taiwan Benevolent Association of California which offers significant support to Taiwanese compatriots living in Southern California. Many of them are originally from #NewTaipeiCity. I hope they'll visit their hometown more often. https://t.co/oTp9qB2Zgb

Happy Police Day!

I salute our hardworking and diligent law enforcement officers, as I used to be one myself. 

Our citizens are very grateful for your contributions and service in keeping us all safe. https://t.co/iyFcIqrGbl

Over the last two weeks at the #WMG2025, Team @NewTaipeiGov & I secured a silver medal 🥈 in #softball. I also competed in #Tabletennis 🏓 & played #basketball 🏀. These are cherished memories from the 2025 World Masters Games. Let's keep exercising for life. https://t.co/nFlTjSUAW3

"We Share the Same Sky." 

I appreciate @IMGAmastets for offering @NewTaipeiGov & @TaipeiCity the opportunity to co-host the #WMG2025.

I'm also grateful to @KP_Taiwan, @WananChiang, and all the staff for making it a successful opening ceremony.

Let's show #Taiwan's hospitality! https://t.co/ajZ6Fhihbw

Happy Mother's Day! ❤️🌹🌸💐❤️  

Wishing every mother in the world a wonderful Mother's Day.  

We are very grateful for your companionship and support as we grew up. Your love for children is always present. Now, you can count on us as you age.

#MothersDay #MothersDay2025 https://t.co/ShFukikWpQ

Celebrating 40 years of sister city relationship between #NewTaipeiCity🇹🇼 & #LandkreisStarnberg🇩🇪! I am very delighted to welcome the #German delegation of elected councilors from #Bayern & #Starnberg to attend the World Masters Games event for our enduring friendship! #WMG2025 https://t.co/Z3sf5YhkmW

I congratulate my good friend @LawrenceWongST and the People's Action Party on their victory in the #GE2025 in Singapore 🇸🇬. 

The friendship between #Taiwan and #Singapore will remain robust under your leadership.

Happy Int'l Workers' Day! I met with #MECO Chairman & Rep. Cheloy E. Velicaria-Garafil. We discussed labor rights, economic cooperation, etc. 

30,000 Filipino residents & guest workers live in #NewTaipeiCity. We have consistently celebrated Filipino Independence Day with MECO.🇵🇭 https://t.co/PRKY1a3QBs

I welcome Amb. #LeeEunHo of the #ROK 🇰🇷 and am very delighted to learn that he very much enjoys driving along the northeast coast in #NewTaipeiCity.

Korea's #KPOP has become extremely popular in #Taiwan. We both hope for further cooperation in #AI, tourism, and trade. https://t.co/amg17PWgTU

The judicature is supposed to #protect people, not #persecute them. I used to be a law enforcement officer, but I'm skeptical about these #unfair & #unjust movements. Let people believe in our legal system, not fear it. Let us #safeguard our precious #democracy as we always have. https://t.co/J12u9S0I1n

I realize #tariffs & negotiations with the #US are the duties of the central govt.

However, I'll do my best to stabilize the cost of living, prevent price gouging, & provide bailouts for businesses.

Domestic political standoffs aren't helpful. I care about people's livelihoods. https://t.co/JcWuuRQ1Q9

I welcome the delegation led by Maryland's Secretary of State, @SenatorSusanLee, @MontCoExec @Marc_Elrich, and @MoCoCouncilMD @Andrew_Friedson. 

The #US & #Taiwan engage in very intensive economic & trade interactions. We all hope to deepen our collaboration on #AI and #biotech. https://t.co/p0cuwXc7tX

Everyone needs #support from time to time. Everything becomes unique with love. ❤️

Today is #WorldDownSyndromeDay. We all need different kinds of support, and so do people who have Down syndrome. I am wearing asymmetrical socks to support them.

#worlddownsyndromeday2025 https://t.co/g2BWt53AGJ

I hosted the delegation of the Chinese-American Elected Officials (#CEO) from @NewTaipeiGov's sister cities in #CA, @DiamondBarCity, @CityofSanMarino, and @cityofmpk. We will continue to deepe our relations on city governance, education, culture, and #US-#Taiwan relations. https://t.co/Mto92g2TvF

Happy International Women's Day!

Women have made significant contributions to our society and the world. My table tennis coach, #SzuYuChen, and steeplechase athlete, #ChaoChunChen, joined me today to celebrate women's achievements in all fields.

Ready for the #WorldMastersGame. https://t.co/3bpuNhSsXB

I am very proud of the performance of Taiwan's baseball players in this exciting @WBCBaseball series.

To celebrate #Taiwan clinching a berth in the #WBC Qualifier in #Taipei, I am announcing that all sports centers in #NewTaipeiCity will be free of charge for 5 days. https://t.co/PI9FImZjYx

Taiwan's baseball players have been doing their best in the last three @WBCBaseball Qualifier games.

I believe they will continue to do the same to get us to #WorldBaseballClassic 2026. 

We the fans will keep cheering for you! Let's go, #Taiwan! 🇹🇼 https://t.co/aOegtr38uK

ONLY 7 DAYS left until the registration deadline for the 2025 World Masters Games (#WMG) in @NewTaipeiGov & @TaipeiCity!

I have registered. Have you?

#IMGA https://t.co/may6pCkz03

Director #Greene of the #AIT/T joined me for 2025 #Pingxi #SkyLantern Festival, recommended by @Discovery & @CNN, also a deal we made in Sept. 2024.

I also created a couplet on the sky lantern to express my wishes for #hope & #harmony for both 🇹🇼&🇺🇲 in the Year of the Snake🐍. https://t.co/6jyUIQd2Fa

Happy #ChineseNewYear and Happy #LunarNewYear! 

Today marks the first day of the #YearOfTheSnake 🐍, and I would like to wish all my fellow citizens, both at home and abroad, a prosperous, fortunate, and blessed year ahead.

#蛇福泰吉 https://t.co/K7i2fvqMSM

I am enjoying the reunion dinner with my family on Chinese Lunar New Year's Eve. I hope you are too.

I will be giving some fortunate gifts in various locations during the upcoming days of the Chinese New Year holidays. Hope to see you there.

#HappyChineseNewYear 
#蛇福泰吉 https://t.co/yspCBu6M0M

120 days to countdown! @NewTaipeiGov & @TaipeiCity  are co-hosting the World Masters Games in May 2025. Mayor @Wananchiang & I played a woodball game, invented by #Taiwanese, with 19 ambassadors & reps from 34 countries in #Taiwan for warm-up. Sign up for the WMG to join us! https://t.co/vHjFKW47Ab

Recent #LAFires have caused severe damage to @CountyofLA. On behalf of @NewTaipeiGov, I extend my heartfelt sympathies to Supervisor @kathrynbarger. #NewTaipeiCity stands with our sister city, #LosAngelesCounty. A salute to the heroes of @LACoFDPIO.  
#EatonFires #PalisadesFires https://t.co/vZDWrSsZOu

A whole new 2025 and a way steadily forward!

From the infrastructure projects in #NewTaipeiCity to our citizens' living environment, I will continue my action plans to bring you happiness.

#HappyNewYear to you on the first day of 2025! https://t.co/DnxvbIU9zR

Fireworks show for 1,314 seconds across the #Tamsui River at 20:25 on the last day of 2024 is breathtaking! 

Wishing all our citizens of #NewTaipeiCity and friends around the world a Happy New Year! https://t.co/eHamOchHwT

#MerryChristmas to everyone!

If you don't visit #Christmasland @NewTaipeiGov, why not come and enjoy the festive atmosphere here?

Also, let's not forget that the ROC Constitution Day 🇹🇼 shares the same date as #ChristmasDay. https://t.co/5l7zrwvu5q

I’d like to extend my congratulations to Mr. Elbridge Colby (@elbridgecolby) on his nomination as Under Secretary of Defense for Policy in the @realdonaldtrump adm. During my last trip to the #US, we exchanged thoughts, and I hope he can bridge #AmericaFirst policy with #Taiwan. https://t.co/TDblfSLVBf

On the cold & windy evening of the winter solstice, there’s nothing better than a bowl of hot sticky rice ball soup to warm yourself. 

Stay warm & share your favorite flavor for this tradition with me in the comments. Have a happy festival!

#WinterSolstice #WinterSolstice2024 https://t.co/yxZcU7nKsp

It's my honor to host ambassadors of @PalauMission, @SaintLuciaUN, @Tuvalu_UN, & @stkittsnevisUN. I appreciate their efforts in advocating for the #RepublicofChina 🇹🇼 (#Taiwan) in the #UN. @NewTaipeiGov showcases the application of #AI & #SmartCities for our distinguished guests. https://t.co/vmwmj1PqZc

Yu-ting, you're absolutely #Taiwan's 🇹🇼 pride & our Olympic gold medalist🥇. I know you won't be defeated by malicious & baseless attacks.

All #Taiwanese, including myself, support the decision you & your coach made, despite the challenges that remain ahead.

#LinYuTing #林郁婷 https://t.co/jMrY5ypmjE

I feel so touched & proud of #Taiwan's baseball players who made history by winning the championship of #Premier12 @WBSC @Premier12.

Tonight, I also see future generations who have excellent role models to learn from. I'm confident these young players will be equally successful. https://t.co/dMuc8l7iWj

#Taiwan🇹🇼 won the championship of #Premier12 tournament!

I've announced all sports centers & swimming pool @NewTaipeiGov admissions #FREE for 1 week to celebrate!

Thank you, our outstanding players, for making history! Thanks @rwardo12, @jonmorosi, @WBSC, @Premier12, & ⚾ fans. https://t.co/AgoEovvBum

RT @Premier12: 🇺🇸 After a game-winning solo shot, Ryan Ward is the Player of the Game against Venezuela! 

#Premier12 https://t.co/Oh2R2j5f…

Congrats! Team #ChineseTaipei (#Taiwan) clinched to the second round of the @Premier12 hosted by @WBSC @TaipeiDome!

Proud of Taiwanese #baseball players 🇹🇼⚾ for bringing us good games at home!

Come join the last outdoor baseball streaming party @NewTaipeiGov on Mon. evening! https://t.co/8nE8Xu5X4n

#TyphoonKongRey (#TyphoonLeon) is currently approaching #NewTaipeiCity.

According to the data from the #CentralWeatherAdministration, I hereby declare a typhoon day off on October 31.

Please exercise caution and make necessary preparations for the impending

#typhoon. https://t.co/zljEuXqd5M

I'm delighted to welcome the delegation of the Federation of Overseas Chinese Associations to @NewTaipeiGov for #DoubleTenthDay celebration.

#FOCA has devoted itself to promoting interactions among our overseas compatriots. We all share a common goal of #unity for our country.🇹🇼 https://t.co/qwdVDeeePm

Happy Double Tenth Day! 🇹🇼🇹🇼🇹🇼
It marks the 113th national day of the #RepublicofChina (#Taiwan) in 2024.

Today, we proudly hold our national flags 🇹🇼 to celebrate together & express our sincere hope for #unity.

中華民國113年國慶日，生日快樂！
#雙十國慶 https://t.co/u6CLeIqu0l

#TyphoonKrathon may begin to impact #NewTaipeiCity late tonight & tomorrow, according to data from the #CentralWeatherAdministration.

Therefore, I'm announcing Oct. 2nd will be a #typhoon day off, as Typhoon Krathon will strike our city. Please stay safe & get prepared. https://t.co/zPOwca6sHA

Happy #TeachersDay!

I would like to express my gratitude to all the dedicated teachers who selflessly discover the potential and inspire the dreams for our children.

#教師節快樂 https://t.co/8b3VaWXsei

Happy #MidAutumnFestival!

Time for another round of #BBQ, along with lots of #mooncake and #pomelos.

Most importantly, spend this day with your family and friends.

#中秋節快樂 https://t.co/dYSeZObUIg

Welcome back, Director Raymond F. #Greene of the #AIT/Taipei!

We previously worked together on pandemic prevention & int'l urban cooperation with the #US. Great to reconnect again as you embark on your 3rd assignment to #Taiwan.

Let's collaborate again for 🇹🇼-🇺🇲 partnership. https://t.co/AcARylHoNH

Delighted to witness the signing of the #MoU #MetroAlliance between #MetroTaiwan (incl. @NewTaipeiGov, @TaipeiCity, Taoyuan, Taichung, & @KaohsiungCity) and @SMRT_Singapore with Amb. #YipWeiKiat of Singapore 🇸🇬.

#Taiwan & #Singapore will work together for better metro services. https://t.co/zScOcoriOh

I appreciate all the efforts of the #ROCAF 🇹🇼 and the rescue team in discovering the ejected pilot on the Mirage 2000-5. 

Sincerely, I wish Captain Hsieh Pei-hsun a safe and speedy recovery. https://t.co/BlIXxmdBig

#ChenPoYen #陳柏諺, a senior high school @Paralympics table tennis athlete from #NewTaipeiCity 🇹🇼, won the #silvermedal 🥈 at his first debut in @Paris2024. 

We are all very proud of this young 17-year-old player and expect Po-yen to achieve more glory in the decades to come. https://t.co/umjWx9WtD5

On #ArmedForcesDay, I humbly pay my respects to the sacrifices made for #freedom & #democracy with solemnity.  I understand the honor to serve as I used to be a police officer. I want to express my appreciation to all the servicemen & servicewomen for safeguarding our homeland.🇹🇼 https://t.co/Eg3epsSx0F

To celebrate Yu-Ting's remarkable achievement at @Paris2024, I announced August 12 the #LinYuTing Day in #NewTaipeiCity.

Free admissions to:

1. Danhai & Ankeng LRT services on Aug. 12.

2. All sports centers & museums sponsored by @NewTaipeiGov until Aug. 18.

#8月12日林郁婷日 https://t.co/KYfx52RGJo
We, watching the game live streaming at @NewTaipeiGov, are so proud of you! #LinYuTing #林郁婷 keeps her words and becomes the #GOLD medalist in female boxing @Paris2024 from #NewTaipeiCity 🇹🇼.

#Taekwondo female #Olympian, #LoChiaLing #羅嘉翎 from #NewTaipeiCity, fought with injuries at @Paris2024. 

Please don't apologize for not advancing or winning medals for #Taiwan. I believe we, the #Taiwanese people, should express our gratitude to you for doing your best. https://t.co/h4Oef97y3s

Incredible to see Olympian #LinYuTing #林郁婷 advancing to the female boxing final. 

Despite the 6-hour time difference, her mother & I cheered her on & had a conversation with her together. 

I have no doubt #YuTing is feeling confident to win the #GOLD medal at @Paris2024. https://t.co/hnTWRw8bFP

Thanks #LeeYang & #WangChiLin for making all #Taiwanese proud & the #Olympics history. 🥇🥇🏸

The first pair to win the #Gold medal of the Badminton Men's Double consecutively in @Paris2024 after @Tokyo2020!

恭喜 #李洋 #王齊麟 奧運羽球男雙金牌二連霸！

Photo credit: HamiVideo https://t.co/Zt5NwKUH44

Lin Yu-Ting #林郁婷, the Olympian female boxing athlete from #NewTaipeiCity 🇹🇼, makes us proud for her outstanding performance.

It's never easy for her to compete on the world's best stage #Paris2024Olympics. We all stand by her side without a doubt.

I'm rooting for #LinYuTing! https://t.co/tyNXaiximV

I receive the delegation of the Federation of Chinese Associations in Japan. I recalled their warm reception for me during my trip to Japan in August 2023. @NewTaipeiGov & #Japan have cooperation for nearly 90 times & 7 sister cities. I hope the delegation well & visit us again. https://t.co/SstUATRjC6

Again, because of the incoming #Typhoon #Gaemi & data from #CentralWeatherAdministration, I just announced another typhoon day off on July 25th in #NewTaipeiCity along with #Taipei @WananChiang, #Taoyuan & #Keelung mayors. Heavy rain & strong winds expected. Please stay at home. https://t.co/7XdyQCY6Ed

#Typhoon #Gaemi is expected to strike #NewTaipeiCity and the entire Taipei metropolitan area on July 24th and 25th. 

I've announced a typhoon day off on July 24th with @WananChiang as well as Taoyuan City & Keelung City mayors.

Please be prepared & stay at home for your safety! https://t.co/E0mcOP9tD9

I first met Director #Oudkirk in Aug 2021. Even during Covid, nothing could stop our interaction. For 3 years, we have gone through a lot, including hosting @BoardChairAIT in @NewTaipeiGov & my #US trip. I hope our #friendship remains. Take care & visit us again, my good friend! https://t.co/JPJUJ2uFAo

I welcome 100+ scholars from 10+ countries to attend @EasternAoM Int'l Conference🇺🇸 on #AI & #Sustanability in #NewTaipeiCity, 1st time in #Taiwan🇹🇼 with @MOFA_Taiwan deputy Tien. Thanks presidents of #NTUB & #FJU for facilitating this inter-city & inter-university collaboration. https://t.co/yeGiRKH6Sc

Celebrating #Cincinnati’s 1st-ever #Taiwan Day 🇹🇼 on June 6, 2024! I've signed & renewed our 30-year sister city relationship b/t @NewTaipeiGov & @CityOfCincy. Grateful to Mayor @AftabPureval & Vice Mayor @KearneyForCincy for keeping our friendship & more collaboration to come. https://t.co/cbpiVYPCgQ

I welcome @StvincentGren🇻🇨 ambassador to the #ROC🇹🇼, Andrea Bowman @svgroctw, a good friend of #NewTaipeiCity & #Taiwan. I express my gratitude for our 43-year diplomatic relations & the latest publication by PM @ComradeRalph. Look forward to collaborating on disaster prevention. https://t.co/sHXcpIPwut

We, the people, have simple & humble wishes: to live and work in peace and contentment. Most importantly, free from the fear of war.

I sincerely wish great success to our newly inaugurated president 🇹🇼 in fulfilling the people's wishes.

地方中央、協力齊心、中華民國、和樂富強。 https://t.co/4E8y2XHpab

I'm thrilled to see my old friend @LawrenceWongST being sworn in as the 4th prime minister of @govsingapore, taking on greater responsibilities. #Singapore will definitely continue its thriving growth under your leadership after two-decade dedication of PM @leehsienloong. 🇹🇼🫶🇸🇬 https://t.co/DuYLBFLoxP

Mom always uses her brief and simple words with endless love to care for each child. Wishing every great mom a #HappyMothersDay!
祝全天下偉大的媽媽，#母親節快樂！ https://t.co/1KzWrOYTwx

#HeyGoogle @NewTaipeiCity! Today, @Google opens & operates its largest AI & hardware R&D base outside #Googleplex in #CA 🇺🇲. I welcome your brilliant choice in #NewTaipeiCity. We continue to build the greatest investment environment for multinational corporations.
#TeamPixel https://t.co/IiYqPdnIZY

I praise PM @leehsienloong's outstanding leadership for his 2-decade service which sets up a great model for middle powers to learn. I'm also confident incoming PM @LawrenceWongST will continue this bright path for #Singapore. May #Taiwan-Singapore friendship last forever! 🇹🇼 🇸🇬 https://t.co/cjdjHQAyeM
